_description: Default color palettes for content-skills. Overridden by brand/VISUAL.md when it exists. Each palette provides a complete set of colors for content generation.

neutral.name: Neutral
neutral.description: Clean, professional palette with grays and a subtle blue accent. Works for any industry.

warm.name: Warm
warm.description: Earthy, approachable palette with terracotta and amber tones. Good for lifestyle, food, wellness brands.

cool.name: Cool
cool.description: Modern, tech-oriented palette with deep blues and teals. Good for SaaS, developer tools, fintech.

bold.name: Bold
bold.description: High-contrast, energetic palette with vivid colors. Good for startups, creative agencies, marketing.

muted.name: Muted
muted.description: Soft, understated palette with desaturated tones. Good for editorial, luxury, finance brands.

dark_mode_overrides._note: When generating dark-mode content, swap background/surface and text_dark/text_light, then adjust for contrast.
